search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Search was constrained to lastzwiki.com. Best matches were the heroes roster page and the laboratory research guide; both fit discovery and cross-validation use. The root page also surfaced, but it is broader and less useful than the specific guides.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Detailed hero roster page with hero lists, levels, and equipment sections; useful for hero discovery and faction checks.
results.primary_user_job: find heroes, compare roster, and inspect equipment

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page with category breakdowns and level-by-level badge costs; useful for research discovery and cost cross-checks.
results.primary_user_job: look up research categories and badge costs

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide that includes early hero notes, progression tips, and basic account setup; useful for onboarding context.
results.primary_user_job: learn early-game progression and starter hero usage

search_records.query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost
search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to www.last-z.wiki. No qualifying results were found for the query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages matching the query were returned from the allowed domain.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to the approved domain returned no indexed results for this query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching pages were found on the allowed domain within the current search index.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to lastz.fandom.com. Best lead is Full Preparedness because it explicitly mentions research and hero-related scoring. No public-claim-ready flags were set.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event with a research-focused cycle and hero-use cycle; useful for linking research, heroes, and reward timing.
results.primary_user_job: Find event tasks tied to research and hero upgrades
claims_to_verify: Ranking rewards and cycle reset timing

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and the main stat systems that can tie into event scoring or upgrade planning.
results.primary_user_job: Identify hero types and upgrade systems
claims_to_verify: Which hero stats matter for events

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; good entry point for finding event structure and access paths.

search_records.search_notes: Search restricted to www.packsify.com returned no discoverable results for the provided query. Could not identify matching Last Z gear guide pages within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results found on the allowed domain for the submitted query.

search_records.search_notes: Search stayed on the allowed domain only. Results favored exact Last Z guide pages over the homepage. A few adjacent but relevant pages were found for cross-validation; generic or non-Last Z pages were not included.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp training, upgrade cap, training speed, and power growth for ranged units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and troop training.
claims_to_verify: Level-by-level cap, speed, and power table

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Assaulter Camp functions, training cap, training speed, and power scaling for melee strike troops.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training.

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for lab research, tech progression, and unlocking a second research queue.
results.primary_user_job: Plan technology research and lab progression.
claims_to_verify: HQ prerequisites tied to lab levels
